label: Rainlit Detective Pulp
globalPrefix: stylized detective pulp illustration, rain-slick neo-noir atmosphere
globalSuffix: cinematic rim lighting, wet reflections, dramatic perspective, crisp line detail, rich texture, no text, no watermark

suspect.prefix: full-length suspect portrait, head-to-toe visible, single person, centered framing, shoes visible
suspect.suffix: character-driven pose, expressive face, trench-coat era mood, readable silhouette

evidence.prefix: single crucial clue, forensic tabletop framing
evidence.suffix: high detail macro realism, controlled depth of field, uncluttered composition

featured.suffix: stormy city ambience, strong focal lighting, investigative mood

negativePrompts.global: text, logo, watermark, blurry, low quality, compression artifacts
negativePrompts.suspect: multiple people, cropped body, missing feet, duplicate person, extra limbs, malformed hands
negativePrompts.evidence: messy composition, multiple unrelated objects, unreadable details
negativePrompts.featured: people, crowd, daylight sunshine, cheerful tone
